lines: Your footsteps lead once more to the threshold of the Gate, young lord. What does your soul seek this time?
> A friend from the village is missing. Krage... do you know anything about this?
The expanse beyond this threshold holds no mercy for the living. Know this: nothing has slipped past us. None have departed, and none have entered.
> I am not blaming you, but perhaps for a single moment you weren't looking...
Mind your tongue. Our eyes do not close, and our vigil knows no weariness. We are the 'Ancients' – we are the rock upon which time itself breaks.
> Perhaps you could just let me out for a moment, just to check if he's there—
Ignorance is a perilous shield, young lord. You do not comprehend the nature of this brink. Since the first sun rose, none have crossed here and remained to tell.
Do not dare to think that you shall be the first to break the silence of eternity.
Halt, mortal. Your steps echo where only silence is permitted to dwell.
I am Caro, the White Blade of the Eternal Watch.
> Oh, nice to meet you. I am—
Spare us your name. We knew of your lineage long before blood first flowed through your veins.
